name: Transcend
description: Data privacy infrastructure platform. Monitor data mapping and privacy compliance.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Transcend at https://app.transcend.io
2. Go to Infrastructure > Developer Tools > API Keys
3. Click Add API Key and assign required scopes
4. Copy the API key and paste it below

checks.name: Transcend App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the Transcend API is accessible.
